tools.name: ask
tools.description: Discover DryUI components, recipes, tokens, and setup guidance. Takes { query, scope, kind?, cwd? }. Scope is one of component | recipe | list | setup.
tools.usage: ask --scope component "Button" to fetch a full component reference; ask --scope recipe "app shell" for the setup recipe.

tools.name: check
tools.description: Validate a .svelte file, a theme .css file, a directory, or the whole workspace. Returns TOON summary + JSON-fenced `dryui-diagnostics` block with hint + docsRef per issue.
tools.usage: check path/to/file.svelte after every write. Feed diagnostics[].hint back into the next prompt until diagnostics is empty.

tools.name: prompt
tools.description: Task-specific prompt generation from the agent contract. Deterministic — same input always produces the same output.
tools.usage: dryui prompt --component Button for import/usage/anti-patterns; dryui prompt --recipe "settings form" for a multi-component plan.

tools.name: svelte-autofixer
tools.description: Runs Svelte's own compiler diagnostics + autofix on a file. Use after DryUI's check loop converges, for Svelte-specific syntax that DryUI's lint doesn't cover.
